memoryArtifacts.description: Named in the Inquisitions Post Mortem following the death of his parents: Matthew de Stowell his son, aged 22 years, is his heir. - Matthew de Stowell son of the said Geoffrey and Juliana, of full age …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Matthew Stawell於1340年出生在英國薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同時，他的父親Geoffrey De Stawell20歲，母親Juliana Gastelin20歲。他於1366年與Elinor Merton在英國薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1379年11月在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Stawell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stowell
meanings: English: habitational name from Stowell (Somerset), Stowell (Gloucestershire), East and West Stowell in Wilcot (Wiltshire), or Stawell (Somerset), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’. The surname was taken to the Isle of Man by 1511, from whence it migrated to Lancashire and Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Matthew Stawell was born in 1340, in Cothelstone, Somerset, England, his father, Geoffrey De Stawell, was 20 and his mother, Juliana Gastelin, was 20. He married Elinor Merton in 1366, in Cothelstone, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in November 1379, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Matthew Stawell est né en 1340, à Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey De Stawell, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Juliana Gastelin, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elinor Merton en 1366, à Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Matthew Stawell 1340 in Cothelstone, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey De Stawell 20 und seine Mutter Juliana Gastelin 20. Er hat 1366 in Cothelstone, Somerset, England Elinor Merton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im November 1379 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elinor Merton nel 1366, nel Cothelstone, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew Stawell(이)가 1340년 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey De Stawell(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Gastelin(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1366년 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤에서 Elinor Merton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 11월 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elinor Merton em 1366, em Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Thomas of Canterbury, Cothelstone, S: ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Matthew Stawell родился в 1340 г. в местности котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey De Stawell было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana Gastelin, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elinor Merton в 1366 г. в местности котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1379 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
